This train departed late due to the late arrival of the train equipment.   It then accumulated a delay due to rail traffic en route and speed restrictions imposed by the railway infrastructure owner.
This train accumulated a delay due to rail traffic on route.
The departure of this train is delayed due to the late arrival of the train equipment.

Due to a track maintenance program, this train will run on a different route on May 30th and May 31st, which will increase our usual run time near Toronto. Furthermore, there will be no service to and from the Oakville station. The schedule has been adjusted to account for this detour.    Please note that delays may occur above and beyond this modified schedule.

The train’s tracking system relies on cellular signal, which is not always available, and the times displayed may not reflect delays or time recovered along the route.  Station layovers can also be reduced to allow the train to recover some of the lost time.  VIA Rail recommends that passengers arrive at the station well in advance of the estimated departure time.  For arrival and departure times, please contact our customer centre at 1-888-VIA-RAIL (1-888 842-7245), or dial 711 on your TTY device and request to be relayed to 1-888-842-7245 (for persons who are deaf, hard-of-hearing, or who have speech disabilities).

Due to high water level, train 691 of May 29th that was scheduled to operate between The Pas and Churchill has been replaced by a bus between Thompson and Gillam. The bus is expected to depart from Thompson on time at 17:00 CDT on May 29th.  Please note that the bus will not make any stops en route between Thompson and Gillam.  Furthermore, please note that a train equipment will be waiting for passengers in Gillam to resume normal service towards Churchill.
